description: A designed graphic showing a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit and purple tie speaking at a lectern with the presidential seal, with the words 'TrumpRx.gov' on the wall behind him and American flags at the sides. Across the lower portion large text reads '$529 BILLION', with the subtext 'Projected Savings for Americans Over The Next Decade Thanks to Most-Favored-Nations Drug Pricing' and a White House wordmark beneath.
notable_text: TrumpRx.gov; $529 BILLION; Projected Savings for Americans Over The Next Decade Thanks to Most-Favored-Nations Drug Pricing
